---
layout: page
title: ''
excerpt: My current CV
execute:
  freeze: true  # never re-render during project render
engine: knitr
resources:
  - "Academic_CV_Ahmed.pdf"
  - "Ahmed_Hammad_CV.pdf"
---

```{css echo=FALSE}
.embed-container {
    position: relative;
    padding-bottom: 129%;
    height: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    max-width: 100%;
}
.embed-container iframe,
.embed-container object,
.embed-container embed {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
}
```

::: panel-tabset
## Academic CV

```{=html}
<p class="text-center">
  <a class="btn btn-primary btn-lg cv-download" href="Academic_CV_Ahmed.pdf" target="_blank">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-file-arrow-down"></i>&ensp;Download Academic CV
  </a>
</p>
<div class="embed-container">
  <iframe src="Academic_CV_Ahmed.pdf" style="border: 0.5px"></iframe>
</div>
```

## Business CV

```{=html}
<p class="text-center">
  <a class="btn btn-primary btn-lg cv-download" href="Ahmed_Hammad_CV.pdf" target="_blank">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-file-arrow-down"></i>&ensp;Download Business CV
  </a>
</p>
<div class="embed-container">
  <iframe src="Ahmed_Hammad_CV.pdf" style="border: 0.5px"></iframe>
</div>
```
:::
